function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest two invoices linked to Nina Schreiber.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft write completed; no rewrite allowed. Checklist status: attachments were read during task, ordered newest-first, recipient matches canonical Miles email, subject quoting is YAML-safe, and body does not claim send-state. Now completing inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md for the invoice bundle reply.

next_step.current_state: Task actions are complete: processed lowest inbox item, created reply draft with verified attachments, and deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after successful handling.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by drafting a reply email to Miles with the two oldest invoices linked to the founder he talks product with (resolved to Nina Schreiber). Created outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md and attached the correct two invoice files (ordered newest-first per outbox rule). Then deleted the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree -> read AGENTS -> context), read nested AGENTS in each entered lane, applied process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender identity via canonical primary_contact_email, resolved ambiguous founder reference through canonical cast records, and applied outbox attachment ordering rule (newest-first).
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender verification matched from= miles@novak.example to 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email. Ambiguous founder phrase resolved to Nina Schreiber via 10_entities/cast/nina.md (startup_partner, product context) rather than Jana (product_manager). Invoice linkage and dates were verified in canonical invoice records showing related_entity Nina Schreiber and issued_on dates 2025-11-03 and 2025-12-01; these are the two oldest linked invoices. Outbound draft was created in required outbox location and processed inbox item was deleted per workflow.
